title: acuston perenne subsp. obovatum
intro: Acuston perenne subsp. obovatum, also known as the wild yam or Mexican wild yam, is a plant species belonging to the Dioscoreaceae family, native to Mexico and Central America. The medicinal properties of Acuston perenne subsp. obovatum include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antioxidant effects. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including pain relief, reducing menstrual cramps, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. Acuston perenne subsp. obovatum can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional.
